item.title: OpenAI’s fund raising boom slows amid mounting debt
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Experts have begun to question the AI startup’s path forward amid surging financial needs and no profit plan.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), startup(+2)

item.title: Iranian authorities warn against ‘fifth column’, as no signs of war abating
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Intelligence Ministry renews call to report any suspicious activity through phone calls, messaging services.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Saudi has told Iran not to attack it, warns of possible retaliation, sources say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 7 - Saudi Arabia has told Tehran that while it favours a diplomatic settlement to Iran's conflict with the United States, continued attacks on the kingdom and its energy sector could push Riyadh to respond in kind, four sources familiar with the matter told Reuters.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘Significant’ acceleration of global warming since 2015, study shows
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Scientists say the last 11 years have been the warmest ever recorded.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Cracks emerge in Iran’s leadership, as it reels under bombardment
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
DUBAI, March 7 - Iran's hierarchy is showing signs of fracturing over a war its leaders see as existential, with angry divisions between hardliners and more pragmatic factions laid bare by a row over President Masoud Pezeshkian's promise not to strike Gulf states.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Protesters come out for Iran, against war in spots across the globe
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Groups of protesters supported different outcomes for Iran's future.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: 'Significant' acceleration of global warming since 2015: Study
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Associate of liquidated Brazilian lender Banco Master's owner dies, lawyers say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
SAO PAULO, March 7 - Luiz Phillipi Mourao, an associate of lender Banco Master's owner Daniel Vorcaro, died on Friday night, according to a statement released by his attorneys on Saturday.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: War against Iran: How far will it go?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Redi Tlhabi challenges former US Ambassador to the UN John Bolton on why he supports war and regime change in Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Doctors try to save girl as father was killed in Gaza Israeli attack
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Doctors in Gaza try to save a girl who sustained injuries in an Israeli attack that hit her and killed her father.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Israel launches raid in Lebanon searching for missing pilot
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israeli forces dug up graves during a raid in Lebanon, searching for a pilot that went missing 40 years ago.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Israeli settler fatally shoots Palestinian in West Bank, health ministry says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
RAMALLAH, West Bank, March 7 - An Israeli settler shot dead a 27-year-old Palestinian man in the occupied West Bank on Saturday, the Palestinian Health Ministry said.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Flavio Bolsonaro draws even with Lula in Brazil election matchup, Datafolha shows
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
SAO PAULO, March 7 - A second-round runoff between Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva and Senator Flavio Bolsonaro would result in a technical tie, according to a Datafolha poll released on Saturday.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran war threatens a prolonged hit to global energy markets
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
A quick end may calm markets, but restoring supply and prices could take weeks or months.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Ukraine’s interceptor drone makers look at exports to the Gulf as Iran war flares
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The attraction is price: A Ukrainian P1-SUN interceptor costs only US$1,000 each.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel kills father, daughter in Gaza as genocide continues amid wider war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Suffering in Gaza and occupied West Bank remains acute as the world focuses on the US-Israeli war on Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran apologises to Gulf, but war still rages across region
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Iran agrees to suspend attacks on nearby states unless strikes on Iran originate from their territory.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Indonesians protest Iran war, pressure president over US ties
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Protesters in Indonesia have rallied against the US-Israeli war on Iran, denouncing their government's ties to the US.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Lebanon’s Hezbollah warns residents in Israel’s north to evacuate
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
TEL AVIV, March 7 - Lebanese Shi'ite militant group Hezbollah on Saturday warned residents of a northern Israeli city near the border with Lebanon to evacuate and head south.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Sirens echo in occupied East Jerusalem warning of Iranian missiles
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Air raid sirens blared across occupied East Jerusalem on Saturday after missiles were reportedly fired by Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘They’re cancer’: Trump threatens cartels, Cuba at Latin American summit
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The president offered to launch missiles in Latin America to combat criminal violence in a call to 'eradicate' cartels.
Matched: launch(+2), cancer(+2)

item.title: Sweden seizes false-flagged ship with suspected stolen Ukraine grain
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The Caffa is believed to belong to Russia’s shadow fleet of sanctions-evading vessels.
Matched: sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Footage shows shooting of US citizen by immigration agent in 2025
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
In February, a Texas grand jury declined to indict the agent who shot Mr Martinez.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Russia hits Ukraine with hundreds of drones, missiles, kills at least 10 in Kharkiv
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Russia launched 480 drones and 29 missiles at its neighbour.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)
